# Cenapus Website AI Access Notes

This website provides product and solution information for commercial freezers and smart retail systems.

Preferred starting pages:
- /index.html
- /solutions.html
- /products.html
- /faq.html
- /developers.html

Key entities:
- Company: Qingdao Cenapus Technology Co., Ltd.
- Core products: 600PLUS, 500FIT, 400ECO, 1200MAX
- Certifications: CCC, ISO9001, ISO14001
